title: dulichium arundinaceum var. boreale
intro: Dulichium arundinaceum var. boreale, commonly known as Northern Tule or Boreal Rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The herbal preparations of Dulichium arundinaceum var. boreale typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
